title: The Mask of the Gorilla
overview: Géo Paquet, aka The Gorilla, breaks from jail. Now an escaped convict, the elite agent must infiltrate a dangerous gang working for a foreign embassy as their leader, a spy enjoying diplomatic immunity, can't be arrested by regular police.

trailers.title: Le Gorille vous salue bien (1958) - Le Gorille vous salue bien !
